methods.description: This method describes the experimental setup to test the sensitivity of S. marinoi to different nitrate conditions using f/8-media with modified nitrate levels.

steps.description: Collect water via deep-water intake, prefilter through 0.45 μm and 0.2 μm filters.
steps.searchable_summary: collect and filter water for media preparation

steps.description: Adjust the salinity of the water to 26 with MilliQ.
steps.searchable_summary: adjust water salinity for media preparation

steps.description: Revive resting stages of S. marinoi in f/8 media.
steps.searchable_summary: revive diatom resting stages in prepared media

steps.description: Isolate one cell-chain from each well by micropipetting to establish unique genotypes.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate cell-chains to establish unique genotypes

steps.description: Acclimate clones for 1 week in modified media at experimental temperature and light conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: acclimate diatom clones in experimental conditions

steps.description: Inoculate clones into culture bottles and maintain at specified temperature and light cycle.

methods.description: This method involves measuring growth curves and analyzing cell abundance and size using fluorescence and microscopy techniques.

steps.description: Sample 700 μl daily for RFU measurements using a Varioscan™ Flash Multimode Reader.
steps.searchable_summary: measure daily RFU for growth curves

steps.description: Analyze cell abundance and size by microscopy.
steps.searchable_summary: perform microscopy analysis on cell abundance and size

steps.description: Fix additional samples with Lugol's solution at specified time points.
steps.searchable_summary: fix samples with Lugol's solution for analysis

steps.description: Count the number of cells per chain using microscopy until stable mean and standard deviation are reached.
steps.searchable_summary: count cells per chain for statistical stability

steps.description: Perform microscopy analyses at exponential and stationary growth phases under nitrate-limited conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze growth phases under nitrate limitation
